name: Dr Marcus Gilroy-Ware
title: Senior Lecturer in Creative Digital Media
department: School of Arts & Department of Music
expertise_topics: Marcus has quite a wide range of interests. Geographically
the global political economy of the internet means an entirely localised expertise in digital media less interesting
but regionally Marcus is particularly interested in Brazil (where he has lived)
research_interests: Marcus has quite a wide range of interests. Geographically; the global political economy of the internet means an entirely localised expertise in digital media less interesting; but regionally Marcus is particularly interested in Brazil (where he has lived); Israel; Palestine; East Africa; South Asia and the Euro-Atlantic
